phrases.intent_en: Do I need to carry my passport for this crossing?
phrases.text_local: Je dois avoir mon passeport pour passer la frontière ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh dwah ah-VWAR mon pass-POR poor pah-SAY lah fron-TYEHR
phrases.cultural_note: Even in Schengen zones, ID checks can occur unexpectedly.

phrases.intent_en: Is there any delay at the border today?
phrases.text_local: Il y a des retards à la frontière aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel yah day ruh-TAR ah lah fron-TYEHR oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Cross-border regional services can run late during strikes or controls.

phrases.intent_en: Do people usually speak French or Italian here?
phrases.text_local: On parle plutôt français ou italien ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: on parl ploo-TOH fron-SAY oo ee-tah-lee-EN ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Both French and Italian are common near Menton/Ventimiglia.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the stop for the Ventimiglia bus?
phrases.text_local: Où est l'arrêt pour le bus de Vintimille ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah-RAY poor luh bewss duh van-tee-MEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Service frequency varies by season; check current timetables.

responses.english: Right there, in front of the station.
